pattern: Union-Find: within a connected component you can traverse all edges arbitrarily, so the minimum AND walk cost equals the AND of all edge weights in the component.
hints: A walk within a connected component can revisit edges, so you can include every edge weight in the AND; the minimum cost between two nodes in the same component is the AND of all edge weights in that component.
Use Union-Find to group nodes by connectivity and simultaneously AND all edge weights into the root's accumulated value.
For each query, if s == t return 0; if they're in different components return -1; otherwise return the component's accumulated AND.

edge_inputs.description: single edge, query within same component
chain of three nodes, query end to end
